_comment: Copy this file to .agents/rbac.json and customise for your team.

admin._comment: Full access — can run any lane, read audit logs, override verdicts and budgets.

developer._comment: Can run all lanes and read audit logs. Cannot override verdicts.

reviewer._comment: Can read audit logs and override supervisor verdicts. Cannot run lanes.

observer._comment: Read-only access — can read audit logs only.

ci._comment: CI/CD service account — can run all lanes but cannot pause for human review.

ci-bot._comment: CI bot cannot run the security-review lane — requires human
